item.title: Ravi the cat has never been elected to any office, but he shows up to the Pennsylvania State Capitol to work anyway.🐈 He just cares that much about the people (and tiny bow ties).🐾 📸 ravibenham / WHTM ABC27 @jessicalbenham #cat #cats #animals #goodnews #

item.title: Orange cats act normal… for like 2 seconds 🍊🐱💥 You think it’s fine… then it completely spirals 😭 No warning. No reason. Just chaos 💀 Follow for your daily dose of cat chaos 🐾 Link in bio ⤵️#funnycatsoftiktok #catcompilation #orangecatenergy🐾🐾 #orangecatbe
item.description: By @purrplay_official: Orange cats act normal… for like 2 seconds 🍊🐱💥 You think it’s fine… then it completely spirals 😭 No warning. No reason. Just chaos 💀 Follow for your daily dose of cat chaos 🐾 Link in bio ⤵️#funnycatsoftiktok #catcompilation #orangecatenergy🐾🐾 #orangecatbe
